word: H2476 - חֲלוּשָׁה - chălûwshâh - khal-oo-shaw' - Being overcome

sections.paragraph:
Original: חלוּשׁה

Transliteration: chălûshâh

Phonetic: khal-oo-shaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. weakness, defeat, prostration

Origin: pass. participle of H2522

TWOT entry: 671b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
